text.title: ADR Decay Detector Agent Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for kb-adr-decay-detector-agent.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the team maintain a meaningful ADR corpus with concrete references?

example.trace: Detector scans 27 ADRs → finds ADR 0007 says Postgres, code uses MongoDB → category=contradiction, evidence cites file+line → ticket opened in architecture review queue.
